raw_consumer_statement:
In XX/XX/year> I purchased an air-conditioner and new duct work for my daughter 's home from XXXX XXXX, a vendor working out of Costco stores . My daughter has a XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX child and is pregnant with my granddaughter and their existing AC while only four years old, was not cooling the house properly. The cost was {$15000.00}. XXXX XXXXXXXX installed the AC unit but said they could not install the new duct work. Since I had paid them to install both and they were NOT priced separately, I filed a dispute with Citi Bank until the matter could be resolved with XXXX XXXX as to how much money I would be refunded for the work NOT done. The XXXX XXXX also did not cool the house properly. Citi Bank initially reversed the {$15000.00} charge on my Citi Costco Visa card but unilaterly decided to close the dispute and place the {$15000.00} charge on my Citi Costco Visa card. This was despite the fact that I had provided them copies of all the documents they requested multiple times. Further, Citi demanded minimum payments in excess of XXXX. To add insult to injury, they damaged my XXXX credit rating and charged me interest on work that was NOT completed. 

After months of negotiating with XXXX XXXX, they agreed to credit me {$11000.00} for the duct work they were unable to do. Since Citi Bank Visa forced to make payments on the charge that I had rightfully disputed, I ended up having a credit of {$2200.00}. I have repeated asked Citi Bank Visa to return the credit on my account to my bank account. I have spoken to many people at Citi Bank, all of which state that they are working on it. On XXXX XXXX and XXXX, XXXX I spoked with XXXX XXXX, XXXX, in their Legal Dept. On XX/XX/XXXX I spoke with XXXX at XXXXXXXX XXXX and XXXX at XXXXXXXX XXXX in the XXXX XXXX. There are many more I have contacted to no avail. 

Because of the totally disrespectful and dismissive way I have been treated by Citi Visa, I plan to close my Citi Costco Visa account as soon as I receive my credit refund. This is my money and they have no valid reason to keep my money, but are doing so. Yet, their excuse for over a month is that they are working on it. 

I would appreciate any help you can give me in getting MY money refunded. Thank you.
